title: Execute sql failed: [HY000][1105] runtime error: index out of range [0] with length 0
description:
## Bug Report

Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks!

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)
```
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS t0;
CREATE TABLE t0(c0 VARCHAR(20));

SELECT t0.c0 FROM t0 WHERE ((IF(('0') BETWEEN 1 AND 1, true, (t0.c0)))AND(SYSDATE()));
```
<!-- a step by step guide for reproducing the bug. -->
### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)
SQL executed successfully.

### 3. What did you see instead (Required)
TiDB behavior
```
mysql> SELECT t0.c0 FROM t0 WHERE ((IF(('0') BETWEEN 1 AND 1, true, (t0.c0)))AND(SYSDATE()));
ERROR 1105 (HY000): runtime error: index out of range [0] with length 0
```

And mysql can execute this query successful.
```
mysql> SELECT t0.c0 FROM t0 WHERE ((IF(('0') BETWEEN 1 AND 1, true, (t0.c0)))AND(SYSDATE()));
Empty set (0.00 sec)

mysql> select version();
+-----------+
| version() |
+-----------+
| 8.4.1     |
+-----------+
1 row in set (0.00 sec)
```
### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required)
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| tidb_version()                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Release Version: v8.5.0
Edition: Community
Git Commit Hash: d13e52ed6e22cc5789bed7c64c861578cd2ed55b
Git Branch: HEAD
UTC Build Time: 2024-12-18 02:26:06
GoVersion: go1.23.3
Race Enabled: false
Check Table Before Drop: false
Store: tikv |
+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(c1 INT, c2 VARCHAR(30), c3 DATE);
INSERT INTO t1(c1, c2, c3) VALUES (1, 'test', '2024-01-01');
SELECT c2 FROM t1 WHERE (IF(c1 BETWEEN 1 AND 2, NULL, c2) IS NOT NULL);
SELECT c3 FROM t1 WHERE (c1 = 1 AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t1 WHERE c2 IS NOT NULL) > 0);
key_bug_features: Index out of range error on specific SQL query
